TEXT.source: Amis Wikipedia, article: O_todongay_no_tamdaw_人權宣言
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: "O todongay no tamdaw a cako"to polong ngangan nira i "Taywan cowlo kiwkay a todongay a cako "onian haw i o nano pakaylaay itiya toka lawlaw no polong no hekal kanatal pakaylaay i Taywan ami pasadakan tosasowaren a tipelok. O longoc to i Taywanay a sayfo"nanay omala so'linay to a kanatal ko Taywan "o sanay, o ninian i o sa'ayaway omi pasadakay to sowal ami longoc a pala kanatal to Taywan a sa'opu itini i Taywan. Itiyasato tada tatanganay o mingiyangiay to saykay a demak, likor sato o ciwlo kiwkay pakayla i 235 a litos ko mihaiay ato 49 ko caay pihai a mapasadak ko nini a longoc a coda. O nian a cako i itini i 1971 a mihecaan ato 1975 a mihecaan ama pasadak 〈Pakaylaay to sowal ato longoc to kanatal〉,〈Opi rekal no niyam 〉osanay a papolong haan i "O toloay a cako "onian a toloay a coda haw i o sapilongoc to kako kokka a siykay a mafana' ama ngodo tono i Taywanay a tamdaw ami keton to niyah a 'orip ato misalakamkam ami pacakat to sakafalic no siykay a mala tapangay a finawolan, likosato tadamaan kopi demak topakaylaay i likakawa no kalo sa'opo i Taywan. O pinanganira:背景 I tini i 1951 a mihecaan, o ittiniay i timolay no Taywan a nano nai Engkilisay a Ciwlo Kiwkay ato i^tipay no Taywan a nano nai Kanatay a Ciwlo Kiwkay , palowad ami patileng to kalacecay nara a o "Taywan ciwlo kiwkay no Sokay" o hahanto ami pangangan, tona mahelek ama palowad ko kiwkay i ira to koya sayfo no Cong-wha-ming-ko ami sapi leperaw ami kali'ang, halo sapi kali'ang nina to a paliyas tosaha kapolongan no kiwkay to kakokoka itini i polon no hekal, ato ano palowad to picodadang i deng ono kawping a sowal kosaka pasifana', ano masasowasowal i caay kanga'ay ami sano paylang a sowal to polong tono inah a sowal. Itini i 1971 a mihecaan, olanang a Cong-wha-ming-ko hananay a sayfo i, mapapiliyas nai sakapolongan kakokoka a Lin-he-ko hananay a sa'opo, i tini i 12 a foladan to 29 a lomi'adan i pasadak ko Ciw-lo-kiwkay to sowal tola 〈O sapi hai to sowal ato longoc to o kanatar kami〉sanay, pakayni tono ni Yis Kilisto a singko to pitoolan, mipasadak a pakonia tono tamdawan a sowal, caay kanga'ay a pakayni i palitemek a 'icel ami pacakay to Taywan, lomasato misa'icel odengan o itiniay i Taywanay a damdaw kocacitodong ami keton tono i Taywanay ama 'orip o sanay a sowal, milongoc to citodongay to tayal a Sifo tosapi liyaw ami singkiw to polong no citodongay to finawolan a tamdaw to singkiw a tayal. Itini i 1973 amihecaan a sakatolo a folad to 20 a lomiad, yamiliasay to Taywan a fokesi ci Hong-cang-hoi ato ci Hong-wo-tong ato ci Lin-cong-i isingan, I tiniay i Amilika ami palowad to "^deng o i Taywanay a Kiliseto ko cacitodong ami ketong"sanay a likakawa. Itini i 1975 a mihecaan, o tapang no Amilika ci Fansi hananay a tamdaw i, miketon to sowal tosa pihomongan to Cowkok , mala fangcalay to ko Amilika ato Cowkok , sanaw ni alaay to sakalawlaw ato talaw no Taywan, saka falo a folad to 16 a lomi'adan, o Taywan kilisto ciwlo kiwkay itiya ami pasadak to sowal tora 〈O todongay no tamdaw〉sanay a lekar, pakayniay tola tapang no Amilika ci Kat'e a pasadak to "O tamdaway"yasanay a sowal, misalialiaw a somowal toka aka apisolikol kamo o Amilika ato kakokoka tono Taywanay a todongay a tamdaw, caay kanga'ay ko Kiwsanto ami hadefek to Taywan, "O 'orip no Taywan i 'deng o i taywanay tora 1700 a ^mangan kocaci todong ami keton"yasanay a sowal, lomasato apilekal i,"Longocen no mita ko citodongay to tayal no kanatar itini i katalawan nona hekar, kafana ami si'yaw, kalamkamen ami demak, tosaka laheci no Taywan a mara so'elinay to mara fa^lohay to a kanatar". O polong a tilid no lekal.宣言全文 Taywan Kristo ciwlo Kiwkay todongay no tamdaw a longoc a sowal(1977 a mihecaan) O kiwkay no niyam pakayni i ngangan ni Yis Kiristo o kalotapang no polong no tamtamdaw, ha-yi so^linay todongay no tamdaw ato sela i ono tada Kawas ami pafelian, pakayni i o itiniay a Taywan to 1700 a ^mangan no tamdaw, toya misi'ayaw to katalawan, itini ami pasadak to sowal. Nano misatapang ci Kator singsi a mala o tapang no Amilika sahto sanay opi lalongoc to "Todongay no tamdaw"yosanay a pisawidang to kanatar, so^lin matamaay to kalanang a demak tosaka lawidang to loma a kanatal, milongoc kami ci Kator a tapangan a so'lin ami dodoen to kohatiniay ana falocoan tora todongay no tamdaw yasanay a sowar, tonia misalingato ami sawidang to Kiwsanto i, irako pilikec ami dodo to"Sapidipot to Taywan a caay ka kali'ang, to saka patileng ato kafangcal no 'orip". Tonian misi'ayaw to sapi hadefekan no kiwsato to Taywan i, pakayni i pidodoniyam to singko ato pipalatamdaw no kakokuka a latoh, misa'icel kami ami dodo to "Polong no Taywanay to 1700 ^mang tamdaw komami keton to niyah a 'orip."pasaylaay i kaloloma a kanatar, ngalefen tono Amilikaay a kanatar to finaweran ato sayfoan, ato polong no hekaray a kako kiwkay a tata'akay tangsolay a longoc, pakiyni i so'elinay o cilaheciay a demak, kosapi coker itamiyanang. Pakayni isaka lomowad ato lihaday no tamdaw no Taywan a faloco, milongoc kami to seyfo to itini toya kalalawlaw no hekal i, kafana' ami si'ayaw, o so^linay a faloco ami demak, tosaka lomowad no Taywan a mala falohay to a kanatar. Milongoc kami to Kawas, o Taywan ato polong no hekar mara"O sida'it ato so'linay a matatawos, o mo^cel ato damesay i masalakapot, o so'linay i naitini i sela a ma'orip, o mo^cer ani kakalayan ama sadak."o sanay, (nai Fangcalay coda"'Olic 85 :10-11 tosil") Taywan Ciwlo Kiwkay Sokay Kicow Caw-sin-kon(masadakay)趙信悃 Sokay dodoKicow Ong-siw-kong(ocitodongy)翁修恭 Sokay Kaycow Kow-coin-ming高俊明 No Tapang a koyomi 1977,08,16 O likor nona demak:後續影響 Olaan a tapang no seyfo ci Cang-cing-kou hananay a tamdaw i, halateng sa olanan a Ciw-lo-kiwkay i, mikihatiya to misakedkeday a tamdaw sanay, sanaw itila ami lingato misasimaw a sapi kalingangaw, mihokhok to kiwkay ami 'aca to salikaka a palalatosa, itila kosaka lopisa no kiwkay, sanaw iraay koma papiliasay a sasafaay a kicow no Singkakoing ci Miti a foksian. Itini i 1978 a mihecaan, tola sa'opo no sokay to mihecaan, olapasaylaay i Koumingtang a tamdawan no ciwlokiway i, iraay ko sapipasadak nala to sowal to sapiliyaw ami ha-i tola 〈O todongay no tamdaw〉sanay a likec, likor sato toya sa'opo to litos i 235 komi cokeray, 49 ko caay ka picoker, to caayay katatodong kola likec sanay a longoc. Yasato kola Koumingtang i, itiyato aci faloco' ami samsam ato ami kali'ang to Taywan-ciwlo-kiwkay . Sahaw itila i 1979 a mihecaan, masadak to koya Miy-li-taw hananay a demak, toyasato tora Ciw-lo-kiwkay a Sokay kayciw ci Kow-coin-min fok-si an topi padang nila toya pireper no siyfo ci Se-min-te an, mala sa'ayaway tadamaanay omareperay a fok-si, itini i 1980-1984 koka lofo nira. Itini i 2007 a mihecaan to sakafalo a folad 5 a lomi'ad, mikining to toya "O tatodong no tamdaw"sanay toka lawod to tolo polo' a mihcaan, ilaay kopi palowad to demak "Taywan-ciw-lo kiwkay tono tamdawan hananay a rekal to tolo' polo a mihecaan a dadaya", dodo sato itini i 8 folad 16 a lomi'adan, ilaay ko pipalowad to "Ono tamdawan a lekkar to tolo polo' mihecaan a lakat". (Siwkolan 'Amis/Pangcah Suman 03/01'25) O tahapinangan a tilid 2022-08-16).
S.PHON: "o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a ʦako~u"to~u po~uɾo~uŋ ŋaŋan nira i "tajwan ʦo~uwɾo~u kiwkaj a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ʦako~u "o~unian ħaw i o~u nano~u pakajɾaaj itija to~uka ɾawɾaw no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ kanataɾ pakajɾaaj i tajwan ami pasaɬ~ɮakan to~usaso~uwarən a tipəɾo~uk. o~u ɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u i tajwanaj a sajfo~u"nanaj o~umaɾa so~uʡɾinaj to~u a kanataɾ ko~u tajwan "o~u sanaj, o~u ninian i o~u saʡajawaj o~umi pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u so~uwaɾ ami ɾo~uŋo~uʦ a paɾa kanataɾ to~u tajwan a saʡo~upo~u~u itini i tajwan. itijasato~u taɬ~ɮa tataŋanaj o~u miŋijaŋiaj to~u sajkaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ɾiko~ur sato~u o~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj pakajɾa i *** a ɾito~us ko~u miħaiaj ato~u ** ko~u ʦaaj piħai a mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~u nini a ɾo~uŋo~uʦ a ʦo~uɬ~ɮa. o~u nian a ʦako~u i itini i **** a miħəʦaan ato~u **** a miħəʦaan ama pasaɬ~ɮak *pakajɾaaj to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u ɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kanataɾ*,*o~upi rəkaɾ no~u nijam *o~usanaj a papo~uɾo~uŋ ħaan i "o~u to~uɾo~uaj a ʦako~u "o~unian a to~uɾo~uaj a ʦo~uɬ~ɮa ħaw i o~u sapiɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kako~u ko~ukka a sijkaj a mafanaʡ ama ŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~uno~u i tajwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ami kəto~un to~u nijaħ a ʡo~urip ato~u misaɾakamkam ami paʦakat to~u sakafaɾiʦ no~u sijkaj a maɾa tapaŋaj a finawo~uɾan, ɾiko~usato~u taɬ~ɮamaan ko~upi ɬ~ɮəmak to~upakajɾaaj i ɾikakawa no~u kaɾo~u saʡo~upo~u i tajwan. o~u pinaŋanira:** i tini i **** a miħəʦaan, o~u ittiniaj i timo~uɾaj no~u tajwan a nano~u nai əŋkiɾisaj a ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj ato~u iʔtipaj no~u tajwan a nano~u nai kanataj a ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj , paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ami patiɾəŋ to~u kaɾaʦəʦaj nara a o~u "tajwan ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj no~u so~ukaj" o~u ħaħanto~u ami paŋaŋan, to~una maħəɾək ama paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u kiwkaj i ira to~u ko~uja sajfo~u no~u ʦo~uŋ-wħa-miŋ-ko~u ami sapi ɾəpəraw ami kaɾiʡaŋ, ħaɾo~u sapi kaɾiʡaŋ nina to~u a paɾijas to~usaħa kapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u kiwkaj to~u kako~uko~uka itini i po~uɾo~un no~u ħəkaɾ, ato~u ano~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋ i ɬ~ɮəŋ o~uno~u kawpiŋ a so~uwaɾ ko~usaka pasifanaʡ, ano~u masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ i ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj ami sano~u pajɾaŋ a so~uwaɾ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ to~uno~u inaħ a so~uwaɾ. itini i **** a miħəʦaan, o~uɾanaŋ a ʦo~uŋ-wħa-miŋ-ko~u ħananaj a sajfo~u i, mapapiɾijas nai sakapo~uɾo~uŋan kako~uko~uka a ɾin-ħə-ko~u ħananaj a saʡo~upo~u, i tini i ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan to~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan i pasaɬ~ɮak ko~u ʦiw-ɾo~u-kiwkaj to~u so~uwaɾ to~uɾa *o~u sapi ħai to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u ɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u o~u kanatar kami*sanaj, pakajni to~uno~u ni jis kiɾisto~u a siŋko~u to~u pito~uo~uɾan, mipasaɬ~ɮak a pako~unia to~uno~u tamɬ~ɮawan a so~uwaɾ, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj a pakajni i paɾitəmək a ʡiʦəɾ ami paʦakaj to~u tajwan, ɾo~umasato~u misaʡiʦəɾ o~uɬ~ɮəŋan o~u itiniaj i tajwanaj a ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ko~uʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami kəto~un to~uno~u i tajwanaj ama ʡo~urip o~u sanaj a so~uwaɾ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u tajaɾ a sifo~u to~usapi ɾijaw ami siŋkiw to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u finawo~uɾan a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u siŋkiw a tajaɾ. itini i **** amiħəʦaan a sakato~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ** a ɾo~umiaɬ~ɮ, jamiɾiasaj to~u tajwan a fo~ukəsi ʦi ħo~uŋ-ʦaŋ-ħo~ui ato~u ʦi ħo~uŋ-wo~u-to~uŋ ato~u ʦi ɾin-ʦo~uŋ-i isiŋan, i tiniaj i amiɾika ami paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʔɬ~ɮəŋ o~u i tajwanaj a kiɾisəto~u ko~u ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami kəto~uŋ"sanaj a ɾikakawa. itini i **** a miħəʦaan, o~u tapaŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi fansi ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, mikəto~un to~u so~uwaɾ to~usa piħo~umo~uŋan to~u ʦo~uwko~uk , maɾa faŋʦaɾaj to~u ko~u amiɾika ato~u ʦo~uwko~uk , sanaw ni aɾaaj to~u sakaɾawɾaw ato~u taɾaw no~u tajwan, saka faɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, o~u tajwan kiɾisto~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj itija ami pasaɬ~ɮak to~u so~uwaɾ to~ura *o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw*sanaj a ɾəkar, pakajniaj to~uɾa tapaŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi katʡə a pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "o~u tamɬ~ɮawaj"jasanaj a so~uwaɾ, misaɾiaɾiaw a so~umo~uwaɾ to~uka aka apiso~uɾiko~uɾ kamo~u o~u amiɾika ato~u kako~uko~uka to~uno~u tajwanaj a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj ko~u kiwsanto~u ami ħaɬ~ɮəfək to~u tajwan, "o~u ʡo~urip no~u tajwan i ʡɬ~ɮəŋ o~u i tajwanaj to~ura **** a ʔmaŋan ko~uʦaʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami kəto~un"jasanaj a so~uwaɾ, ɾo~umasato~u apiɾəkaɾ i,"ɾo~uŋo~uʦən no~u mita ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u tajaɾ no~u kanatar itini i kataɾawan no~una ħəkar, kafana ami siʡjaw, kaɾamkamən ami ɬ~ɮəmak, to~usaka ɾaħəʦi no~u tajwan a mara so~uʡəɾinaj to~u mara faʔɾo~uħaj to~u a kanatar". o~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɾəkaɾ.**** tajwan kristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a ɾo~uŋo~uʦ a so~uwaɾ(**** a miħəʦaan) o~u kiwkaj no~u nijam pakajni i ŋaŋan ni jis kiristo~u o~u kaɾo~utapaŋ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamtamɬ~ɮaw, ħa-ji so~uʔɾinaj to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u səɾa i o~uno~u taɬ~ɮa kawas ami pafəɾian, pakajni i o~u itiniaj a tajwan to~u **** a ʔmaŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, to~uja misiʡajaw to~u kataɾawan, itini ami pasaɬ~ɮak to~u so~uwaɾ. nano~u misatapaŋ ʦi kato~ur siŋsi a maɾa o~u tapaŋ no~u amiɾika saħto~u sanaj o~upi ɾaɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u "to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw"jo~usanaj a pisawiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kanatar, so~uʔɾin matamaaj to~u kaɾanaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak to~usaka ɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ɾo~uma a kanataɾ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ kami ʦi kato~ur a tapaŋan a so~uʡɾin ami ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~uən to~u ko~uħatiniaj ana faɾo~uʦo~uan to~ura to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw jasanaj a so~uwar, to~unia misaɾiŋato~u ami sawiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kiwsanto~u i, irako~u piɾikəʦ ami ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u"sapiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u tajwan a ʦaaj ka kaɾiʡaŋ, to~u saka patiɾəŋ ato~u kafaŋʦaɾ no~u ʡo~urip". to~unian misiʡajaw to~u sapi ħaɬ~ɮəfəkan no~u kiwsato~u to~u tajwan i, pakajni i piɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~unijam to~u siŋko~u ato~u pipaɾatamɬ~ɮaw no~u kako~uko~u~uka a ɾato~uħ, misaʡiʦəɾ kami ami ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwanaj to~u **** ʔmaŋ tamɬ~ɮaw ko~umami kəto~un to~u nijaħ a ʡo~urip."pasajɾaaj i kaɾo~uɾo~uma a kanatar, ŋaɾəfən to~uno~u amiɾikaaj a kanatar to~u finawəran ato~u sajfo~uan, ato~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaraj a kako~u kiwkaj a tataʡakaj taŋso~uɾaj a ɾo~uŋo~uʦ, pakijni i so~uʡəɾinaj o~u ʦiɾaħəʦiaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ko~usapi ʦo~ukər itamijanaŋ. pakajni isaka ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ ato~u ɾiħaɬ~ɮaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan a faɾo~uʦo~u, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ kami to~u səjfo~u to~u itini to~uja kaɾaɾawɾaw no~u ħəkaɾ i, kafanaʡ ami siʡajaw, o~u so~uʔɾinaj a faɾo~uʦo~u ami ɬ~ɮəmak, to~usaka ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u tajwan a maɾa faɾo~uħaj to~u a kanatar. miɾo~uŋo~uʦ kami to~u kawas, o~u tajwan ato~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkar mara"o~u siɬ~ɮaʡit ato~u so~uʡɾinaj a matatawo~us, o~u mo~uʔʦəɾ ato~u ɬ~ɮaməsaj i masaɾakapo~ut, o~u so~uʡɾinaj i naitini i səɾa a maʡo~urip, o~u mo~uʔʦər ani kakaɾajan ama saɬ~ɮak."o~u sanaj, (nai faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮa"ʡo~uɾiʦ ** :**-** to~usiɾ") tajwan ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj so~ukaj kiʦo~uw ʦaw-sin-ko~un(masaɬ~ɮakaj)*** so~ukaj ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~ukiʦo~uw o~uŋ-siw-ko~uŋ(o~uʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋj)*** so~ukaj kajʦo~uw ko~uw-ʦo~uin-miŋ*** no~u tapaŋ a ko~ujo~umi ****,**,** o~u ɾiko~ur no~una ɬ~ɮəmak:**** o~uɾaan a tapaŋ no~u səjfo~u ʦi ʦaŋ-ʦiŋ-ko~uo~u~u ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ħaɾatəŋ sa o~uɾanan a ʦiw-ɾo~u-kiwkaj i, mikiħatija to~u misakəɬ~ɮkəɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj, sanaw itiɾa ami ɾiŋato~u misasimaw a sapi kaɾiŋaŋaw, miħo~ukħo~uk to~u kiwkaj ami ʡaʦa to~u saɾikaka a paɾaɾato~usa, itiɾa ko~usaka ɾo~upisa no~u kiwkaj, sanaw iraaj ko~uma papiɾiasaj a sasafaaj a kiʦo~uw no~u siŋkako~uiŋ ʦi miti a fo~uksian. itini i **** a miħəʦaan, to~uɾa saʡo~upo~u no~u so~ukaj to~u miħəʦaan, o~uɾapasajɾaaj i ko~uo~u~umiŋtaŋ a tamɬ~ɮawan no~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwaj i, iraaj ko~u sapipasaɬ~ɮak naɾa to~u so~uwaɾ to~u sapiɾijaw ami ħa-i to~uɾa *o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw*sanaj a ɾikəʦ, ɾiko~ur sato~u to~uja saʡo~upo~u to~u ɾito~us i *** ko~umi ʦo~ukəraj, ** ko~u ʦaaj ka piʦo~ukər, to~u ʦaajaj katato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~uɾa ɾikəʦ sanaj a ɾo~uŋo~uʦ. jasato~u ko~uɾa ko~uo~u~umiŋtaŋ i, itijato~u aʦi faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ami samsam ato~u ami kaɾiʡaŋ to~u tajwan-ʦiwɾo~u-kiwkaj . saħaw itiɾa i **** a miħəʦaan, masaɬ~ɮak to~u ko~uja mij-ɾi-taw ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, to~ujasato~u to~ura ʦiw-ɾo~u-kiwkaj a so~ukaj kajʦiw ʦi ko~uw-ʦo~uin-min fo~uk-si an to~upi paɬ~ɮaŋ niɾa to~uja pirəpər no~u sijfo~u ʦi sə-min-tə an, maɾa saʡajawaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj o~umarəpəraj a fo~uk-si, itini i ****-**** ko~uka ɾo~ufo~u nira. itini i **** a miħəʦaan to~u sakafaɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mikiniŋ to~u to~uja "o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw"sanaj to~uka ɾawo~uɬ~ɮ to~u to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ a miħʦaan, iɾaaj ko~upi paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak "tajwan-ʦiw-ɾo~u kiwkaj to~uno~u tamɬ~ɮawan ħananaj a rəkaɾ to~u to~uɾo~uʡ po~uɾo~u a miħəʦaan a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja", ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u sato~u itini i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, iɾaaj ko~u pipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "o~uno~u tamɬ~ɮawan a ɾəkkar to~u to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ miħəʦaan a ɾakat". (siwko~uɾan ʡamis/paŋʦaħ so~u~uman **/**ʡ**) o~u taħapinaŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ****-**-**).
S.FORM: "O todongay no tamdaw a cako"to polong ngangan nira i "Taywan cowlo kiwkay a todongay a cako "onian haw i o nano pakaylaay itiya toka lawlaw no polong no hekal kanatal pakaylaay i Taywan ami pasadakan tosasowaren a tipelok. O longoc to i Taywanay a sayfo"nanay omala so'linay to a kanatal ko Taywan "o sanay, o ninian i o sa'ayaway omi pasadakay to sowal ami longoc a pala kanatal to Taywan a sa'opu itini i Taywan. Itiyasato tada tatanganay o mingiyangiay to saykay a demak, likor sato o ciwlo kiwkay pakayla i 235 a litos ko mihaiay ato 49 ko caay pihai a mapasadak ko nini a longoc a coda. O nian a cako i itini i 1971 a mihecaan ato 1975 a mihecaan ama pasadak 〈Pakaylaay to sowal ato longoc to kanatal〉,〈Opi rekal no niyam 〉osanay a papolong haan i "O toloay a cako "onian a toloay a coda haw i o sapilongoc to kako kokka a siykay a mafana' ama ngodo tono i Taywanay a tamdaw ami keton to niyah a 'orip ato misalakamkam ami pacakat to sakafalic no siykay a mala tapangay a finawolan, likosato tadamaan kopi demak topakaylaay i likakawa no kalo sa'opo i Taywan. O pinanganira:背景 I tini i 1951 a mihecaan, o ittiniay i timolay no Taywan a nano nai Engkilisay a Ciwlo Kiwkay ato i^tipay no Taywan a nano nai Kanatay a Ciwlo Kiwkay , palowad ami patileng to kalacecay nara a o "Taywan ciwlo kiwkay no Sokay" o hahanto ami pangangan, tona mahelek ama palowad ko kiwkay i ira to koya sayfo no Cong-wha-ming-ko ami sapi leperaw ami kali'ang, halo sapi kali'ang nina to a paliyas tosaha kapolongan no kiwkay to kakokoka itini i polon no hekal, ato ano palowad to picodadang i deng ono kawping a sowal kosaka pasifana', ano masasowasowal i caay kanga'ay ami sano paylang a sowal to polong tono inah a sowal. Itini i 1971 a mihecaan, olanang a Cong-wha-ming-ko hananay a sayfo i, mapapiliyas nai sakapolongan kakokoka a Lin-he-ko hananay a sa'opo, i tini i 12 a foladan to 29 a lomi'adan i pasadak ko Ciw-lo-kiwkay to sowal tola 〈O sapi hai to sowal ato longoc to o kanatar kami〉sanay, pakayni tono ni Yis Kilisto a singko to pitoolan, mipasadak a pakonia tono tamdawan a sowal, caay kanga'ay a pakayni i palitemek a 'icel ami pacakay to Taywan, lomasato misa'icel odengan o itiniay i Taywanay a damdaw kocacitodong ami keton tono i Taywanay ama 'orip o sanay a sowal, milongoc to citodongay to tayal a Sifo tosapi liyaw ami singkiw to polong no citodongay to finawolan a tamdaw to singkiw a tayal. Itini i 1973 amihecaan a sakatolo a folad to 20 a lomiad, yamiliasay to Taywan a fokesi ci Hong-cang-hoi ato ci Hong-wo-tong ato ci Lin-cong-i isingan, I tiniay i Amilika ami palowad to "^deng o i Taywanay a Kiliseto ko cacitodong ami ketong"sanay a likakawa. Itini i 1975 a mihecaan, o tapang no Amilika ci Fansi hananay a tamdaw i, miketon to sowal tosa pihomongan to Cowkok , mala fangcalay to ko Amilika ato Cowkok , sanaw ni alaay to sakalawlaw ato talaw no Taywan, saka falo a folad to 16 a lomi'adan, o Taywan kilisto ciwlo kiwkay itiya ami pasadak to sowal tora 〈O todongay no tamdaw〉sanay a lekar, pakayniay tola tapang no Amilika ci Kat'e a pasadak to "O tamdaway"yasanay a sowal, misalialiaw a somowal toka aka apisolikol kamo o Amilika ato kakokoka tono Taywanay a todongay a tamdaw, caay kanga'ay ko Kiwsanto ami hadefek to Taywan, "O 'orip no Taywan i 'deng o i taywanay tora 1700 a ^mangan kocaci todong ami keton"yasanay a sowal, lomasato apilekal i,"Longocen no mita ko citodongay to tayal no kanatar itini i katalawan nona hekar, kafana ami si'yaw, kalamkamen ami demak, tosaka laheci no Taywan a mara so'elinay to mara fa^lohay to a kanatar". O polong a tilid no lekal.宣言全文 Taywan Kristo ciwlo Kiwkay todongay no tamdaw a longoc a sowal(1977 a mihecaan) O kiwkay no niyam pakayni i ngangan ni Yis Kiristo o kalotapang no polong no tamtamdaw, ha-yi so^linay todongay no tamdaw ato sela i ono tada Kawas ami pafelian, pakayni i o itiniay a Taywan to 1700 a ^mangan no tamdaw, toya misi'ayaw to katalawan, itini ami pasadak to sowal. Nano misatapang ci Kator singsi a mala o tapang no Amilika sahto sanay opi lalongoc to "Todongay no tamdaw"yosanay a pisawidang to kanatar, so^lin matamaay to kalanang a demak tosaka lawidang to loma a kanatal, milongoc kami ci Kator a tapangan a so'lin ami dodoen to kohatiniay ana falocoan tora todongay no tamdaw yasanay a sowar, tonia misalingato ami sawidang to Kiwsanto i, irako pilikec ami dodo to"Sapidipot to Taywan a caay ka kali'ang, to saka patileng ato kafangcal no 'orip". Tonian misi'ayaw to sapi hadefekan no kiwsato to Taywan i, pakayni i pidodoniyam to singko ato pipalatamdaw no kakokuka a latoh, misa'icel kami ami dodo to "Polong no Taywanay to 1700 ^mang tamdaw komami keton to niyah a 'orip."pasaylaay i kaloloma a kanatar, ngalefen tono Amilikaay a kanatar to finaweran ato sayfoan, ato polong no hekaray a kako kiwkay a tata'akay tangsolay a longoc, pakiyni i so'elinay o cilaheciay a demak, kosapi coker itamiyanang. Pakayni isaka lomowad ato lihaday no tamdaw no Taywan a faloco, milongoc kami to seyfo to itini toya kalalawlaw no hekal i, kafana' ami si'ayaw, o so^linay a faloco ami demak, tosaka lomowad no Taywan a mala falohay to a kanatar. Milongoc kami to Kawas, o Taywan ato polong no hekar mara"O sida'it ato so'linay a matatawos, o mo^cel ato damesay i masalakapot, o so'linay i naitini i sela a ma'orip, o mo^cer ani kakalayan ama sadak."o sanay, (nai Fangcalay coda"'Olic 85 :10-11 tosil") Taywan Ciwlo Kiwkay Sokay Kicow Caw-sin-kon(masadakay)趙信悃 Sokay dodoKicow Ong-siw-kong(ocitodongy)翁修恭 Sokay Kaycow Kow-coin-ming高俊明 No Tapang a koyomi 1977,08,16 O likor nona demak:後續影響 Olaan a tapang no seyfo ci Cang-cing-kou hananay a tamdaw i, halateng sa olanan a Ciw-lo-kiwkay i, mikihatiya to misakedkeday a tamdaw sanay, sanaw itila ami lingato misasimaw a sapi kalingangaw, mihokhok to kiwkay ami 'aca to salikaka a palalatosa, itila kosaka lopisa no kiwkay, sanaw iraay koma papiliasay a sasafaay a kicow no Singkakoing ci Miti a foksian. Itini i 1978 a mihecaan, tola sa'opo no sokay to mihecaan, olapasaylaay i Koumingtang a tamdawan no ciwlokiway i, iraay ko sapipasadak nala to sowal to sapiliyaw ami ha-i tola 〈O todongay no tamdaw〉sanay a likec, likor sato toya sa'opo to litos i 235 komi cokeray, 49 ko caay ka picoker, to caayay katatodong kola likec sanay a longoc. Yasato kola Koumingtang i, itiyato aci faloco' ami samsam ato ami kali'ang to Taywan-ciwlo-kiwkay . Sahaw itila i 1979 a mihecaan, masadak to koya Miy-li-taw hananay a demak, toyasato tora Ciw-lo-kiwkay a Sokay kayciw ci Kow-coin-min fok-si an topi padang nila toya pireper no siyfo ci Se-min-te an, mala sa'ayaway tadamaanay omareperay a fok-si, itini i 1980-1984 koka lofo nira. Itini i 2007 a mihecaan to sakafalo a folad 5 a lomi'ad, mikining to toya "O tatodong no tamdaw"sanay toka lawod to tolo polo' a mihcaan, ilaay kopi palowad to demak "Taywan-ciw-lo kiwkay tono tamdawan hananay a rekal to tolo' polo a mihecaan a dadaya", dodo sato itini i 8 folad 16 a lomi'adan, ilaay ko pipalowad to "Ono tamdawan a lekkar to tolo polo' mihecaan a lakat". (Siwkolan 'Amis/Pangcah Suman 03/01'25) O tahapinangan a tilid 2022-08-16).
S.PHON: "o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a ʦako~u"to~u po~uɾo~uŋ ŋaŋan nira i "tajwan ʦo~uwɾo~u kiwkaj a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ʦako~u "o~unian ħaw i o~u nano~u pakajɾaaj itija to~uka ɾawɾaw no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ kanataɾ pakajɾaaj i tajwan ami pasaɬ~ɮakan to~usaso~uwarən a tipəɾo~uk. o~u ɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u i tajwanaj a sajfo~u"nanaj o~umaɾa so~uʡɾinaj to~u a kanataɾ ko~u tajwan "o~u sanaj, o~u ninian i o~u saʡajawaj o~umi pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u so~uwaɾ ami ɾo~uŋo~uʦ a paɾa kanataɾ to~u tajwan a saʡo~upo~u~u itini i tajwan. itijasato~u taɬ~ɮa tataŋanaj o~u miŋijaŋiaj to~u sajkaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ɾiko~ur sato~u o~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj pakajɾa i *** a ɾito~us ko~u miħaiaj ato~u ** ko~u ʦaaj piħai a mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~u nini a ɾo~uŋo~uʦ a ʦo~uɬ~ɮa. o~u nian a ʦako~u i itini i **** a miħəʦaan ato~u **** a miħəʦaan ama pasaɬ~ɮak *pakajɾaaj to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u ɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kanataɾ*,*o~upi rəkaɾ no~u nijam *o~usanaj a papo~uɾo~uŋ ħaan i "o~u to~uɾo~uaj a ʦako~u "o~unian a to~uɾo~uaj a ʦo~uɬ~ɮa ħaw i o~u sapiɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kako~u ko~ukka a sijkaj a mafanaʡ ama ŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~uno~u i tajwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ami kəto~un to~u nijaħ a ʡo~urip ato~u misaɾakamkam ami paʦakat to~u sakafaɾiʦ no~u sijkaj a maɾa tapaŋaj a finawo~uɾan, ɾiko~usato~u taɬ~ɮamaan ko~upi ɬ~ɮəmak to~upakajɾaaj i ɾikakawa no~u kaɾo~u saʡo~upo~u i tajwan. o~u pinaŋanira:** i tini i **** a miħəʦaan, o~u ittiniaj i timo~uɾaj no~u tajwan a nano~u nai əŋkiɾisaj a ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj ato~u iʔtipaj no~u tajwan a nano~u nai kanataj a ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj , paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ami patiɾəŋ to~u kaɾaʦəʦaj nara a o~u "tajwan ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj no~u so~ukaj" o~u ħaħanto~u ami paŋaŋan, to~una maħəɾək ama paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u kiwkaj i ira to~u ko~uja sajfo~u no~u ʦo~uŋ-wħa-miŋ-ko~u ami sapi ɾəpəraw ami kaɾiʡaŋ, ħaɾo~u sapi kaɾiʡaŋ nina to~u a paɾijas to~usaħa kapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u kiwkaj to~u kako~uko~uka itini i po~uɾo~un no~u ħəkaɾ, ato~u ano~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋ i ɬ~ɮəŋ o~uno~u kawpiŋ a so~uwaɾ ko~usaka pasifanaʡ, ano~u masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ i ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj ami sano~u pajɾaŋ a so~uwaɾ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ to~uno~u inaħ a so~uwaɾ. itini i **** a miħəʦaan, o~uɾanaŋ a ʦo~uŋ-wħa-miŋ-ko~u ħananaj a sajfo~u i, mapapiɾijas nai sakapo~uɾo~uŋan kako~uko~uka a ɾin-ħə-ko~u ħananaj a saʡo~upo~u, i tini i ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan to~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan i pasaɬ~ɮak ko~u ʦiw-ɾo~u-kiwkaj to~u so~uwaɾ to~uɾa *o~u sapi ħai to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u ɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u o~u kanatar kami*sanaj, pakajni to~uno~u ni jis kiɾisto~u a siŋko~u to~u pito~uo~uɾan, mipasaɬ~ɮak a pako~unia to~uno~u tamɬ~ɮawan a so~uwaɾ, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj a pakajni i paɾitəmək a ʡiʦəɾ ami paʦakaj to~u tajwan, ɾo~umasato~u misaʡiʦəɾ o~uɬ~ɮəŋan o~u itiniaj i tajwanaj a ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ko~uʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami kəto~un to~uno~u i tajwanaj ama ʡo~urip o~u sanaj a so~uwaɾ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u tajaɾ a sifo~u to~usapi ɾijaw ami siŋkiw to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u finawo~uɾan a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u siŋkiw a tajaɾ. itini i **** amiħəʦaan a sakato~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ** a ɾo~umiaɬ~ɮ, jamiɾiasaj to~u tajwan a fo~ukəsi ʦi ħo~uŋ-ʦaŋ-ħo~ui ato~u ʦi ħo~uŋ-wo~u-to~uŋ ato~u ʦi ɾin-ʦo~uŋ-i isiŋan, i tiniaj i amiɾika ami paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʔɬ~ɮəŋ o~u i tajwanaj a kiɾisəto~u ko~u ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami kəto~uŋ"sanaj a ɾikakawa. itini i **** a miħəʦaan, o~u tapaŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi fansi ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, mikəto~un to~u so~uwaɾ to~usa piħo~umo~uŋan to~u ʦo~uwko~uk , maɾa faŋʦaɾaj to~u ko~u amiɾika ato~u ʦo~uwko~uk , sanaw ni aɾaaj to~u sakaɾawɾaw ato~u taɾaw no~u tajwan, saka faɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, o~u tajwan kiɾisto~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj itija ami pasaɬ~ɮak to~u so~uwaɾ to~ura *o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw*sanaj a ɾəkar, pakajniaj to~uɾa tapaŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi katʡə a pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "o~u tamɬ~ɮawaj"jasanaj a so~uwaɾ, misaɾiaɾiaw a so~umo~uwaɾ to~uka aka apiso~uɾiko~uɾ kamo~u o~u amiɾika ato~u kako~uko~uka to~uno~u tajwanaj a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj ko~u kiwsanto~u ami ħaɬ~ɮəfək to~u tajwan, "o~u ʡo~urip no~u tajwan i ʡɬ~ɮəŋ o~u i tajwanaj to~ura **** a ʔmaŋan ko~uʦaʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami kəto~un"jasanaj a so~uwaɾ, ɾo~umasato~u apiɾəkaɾ i,"ɾo~uŋo~uʦən no~u mita ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u tajaɾ no~u kanatar itini i kataɾawan no~una ħəkar, kafana ami siʡjaw, kaɾamkamən ami ɬ~ɮəmak, to~usaka ɾaħəʦi no~u tajwan a mara so~uʡəɾinaj to~u mara faʔɾo~uħaj to~u a kanatar". o~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɾəkaɾ.**** tajwan kristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a ɾo~uŋo~uʦ a so~uwaɾ(**** a miħəʦaan) o~u kiwkaj no~u nijam pakajni i ŋaŋan ni jis kiristo~u o~u kaɾo~utapaŋ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamtamɬ~ɮaw, ħa-ji so~uʔɾinaj to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u səɾa i o~uno~u taɬ~ɮa kawas ami pafəɾian, pakajni i o~u itiniaj a tajwan to~u **** a ʔmaŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, to~uja misiʡajaw to~u kataɾawan, itini ami pasaɬ~ɮak to~u so~uwaɾ. nano~u misatapaŋ ʦi kato~ur siŋsi a maɾa o~u tapaŋ no~u amiɾika saħto~u sanaj o~upi ɾaɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u "to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw"jo~usanaj a pisawiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kanatar, so~uʔɾin matamaaj to~u kaɾanaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak to~usaka ɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ɾo~uma a kanataɾ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ kami ʦi kato~ur a tapaŋan a so~uʡɾin ami ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~uən to~u ko~uħatiniaj ana faɾo~uʦo~uan to~ura to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw jasanaj a so~uwar, to~unia misaɾiŋato~u ami sawiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kiwsanto~u i, irako~u piɾikəʦ ami ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u"sapiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u tajwan a ʦaaj ka kaɾiʡaŋ, to~u saka patiɾəŋ ato~u kafaŋʦaɾ no~u ʡo~urip". to~unian misiʡajaw to~u sapi ħaɬ~ɮəfəkan no~u kiwsato~u to~u tajwan i, pakajni i piɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~unijam to~u siŋko~u ato~u pipaɾatamɬ~ɮaw no~u kako~uko~u~uka a ɾato~uħ, misaʡiʦəɾ kami ami ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwanaj to~u **** ʔmaŋ tamɬ~ɮaw ko~umami kəto~un to~u nijaħ a ʡo~urip."pasajɾaaj i kaɾo~uɾo~uma a kanatar, ŋaɾəfən to~uno~u amiɾikaaj a kanatar to~u finawəran ato~u sajfo~uan, ato~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaraj a kako~u kiwkaj a tataʡakaj taŋso~uɾaj a ɾo~uŋo~uʦ, pakijni i so~uʡəɾinaj o~u ʦiɾaħəʦiaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ko~usapi ʦo~ukər itamijanaŋ. pakajni isaka ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ ato~u ɾiħaɬ~ɮaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan a faɾo~uʦo~u, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ kami to~u səjfo~u to~u itini to~uja kaɾaɾawɾaw no~u ħəkaɾ i, kafanaʡ ami siʡajaw, o~u so~uʔɾinaj a faɾo~uʦo~u ami ɬ~ɮəmak, to~usaka ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u tajwan a maɾa faɾo~uħaj to~u a kanatar. miɾo~uŋo~uʦ kami to~u kawas, o~u tajwan ato~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkar mara"o~u siɬ~ɮaʡit ato~u so~uʡɾinaj a matatawo~us, o~u mo~uʔʦəɾ ato~u ɬ~ɮaməsaj i masaɾakapo~ut, o~u so~uʡɾinaj i naitini i səɾa a maʡo~urip, o~u mo~uʔʦər ani kakaɾajan ama saɬ~ɮak."o~u sanaj, (nai faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮa"ʡo~uɾiʦ ** :**-** to~usiɾ") tajwan ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj so~ukaj kiʦo~uw ʦaw-sin-ko~un(masaɬ~ɮakaj)*** so~ukaj ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~ukiʦo~uw o~uŋ-siw-ko~uŋ(o~uʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋj)*** so~ukaj kajʦo~uw ko~uw-ʦo~uin-miŋ*** no~u tapaŋ a ko~ujo~umi ****,**,** o~u ɾiko~ur no~una ɬ~ɮəmak:**** o~uɾaan a tapaŋ no~u səjfo~u ʦi ʦaŋ-ʦiŋ-ko~uo~u~u ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ħaɾatəŋ sa o~uɾanan a ʦiw-ɾo~u-kiwkaj i, mikiħatija to~u misakəɬ~ɮkəɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj, sanaw itiɾa ami ɾiŋato~u misasimaw a sapi kaɾiŋaŋaw, miħo~ukħo~uk to~u kiwkaj ami ʡaʦa to~u saɾikaka a paɾaɾato~usa, itiɾa ko~usaka ɾo~upisa no~u kiwkaj, sanaw iraaj ko~uma papiɾiasaj a sasafaaj a kiʦo~uw no~u siŋkako~uiŋ ʦi miti a fo~uksian. itini i **** a miħəʦaan, to~uɾa saʡo~upo~u no~u so~ukaj to~u miħəʦaan, o~uɾapasajɾaaj i ko~uo~u~umiŋtaŋ a tamɬ~ɮawan no~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwaj i, iraaj ko~u sapipasaɬ~ɮak naɾa to~u so~uwaɾ to~u sapiɾijaw ami ħa-i to~uɾa *o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw*sanaj a ɾikəʦ, ɾiko~ur sato~u to~uja saʡo~upo~u to~u ɾito~us i *** ko~umi ʦo~ukəraj, ** ko~u ʦaaj ka piʦo~ukər, to~u ʦaajaj katato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~uɾa ɾikəʦ sanaj a ɾo~uŋo~uʦ. jasato~u ko~uɾa ko~uo~u~umiŋtaŋ i, itijato~u aʦi faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ami samsam ato~u ami kaɾiʡaŋ to~u tajwan-ʦiwɾo~u-kiwkaj . saħaw itiɾa i **** a miħəʦaan, masaɬ~ɮak to~u ko~uja mij-ɾi-taw ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, to~ujasato~u to~ura ʦiw-ɾo~u-kiwkaj a so~ukaj kajʦiw ʦi ko~uw-ʦo~uin-min fo~uk-si an to~upi paɬ~ɮaŋ niɾa to~uja pirəpər no~u sijfo~u ʦi sə-min-tə an, maɾa saʡajawaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj o~umarəpəraj a fo~uk-si, itini i ****-**** ko~uka ɾo~ufo~u nira. itini i **** a miħəʦaan to~u sakafaɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mikiniŋ to~u to~uja "o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw"sanaj to~uka ɾawo~uɬ~ɮ to~u to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ a miħʦaan, iɾaaj ko~upi paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak "tajwan-ʦiw-ɾo~u kiwkaj to~uno~u tamɬ~ɮawan ħananaj a rəkaɾ to~u to~uɾo~uʡ po~uɾo~u a miħəʦaan a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja", ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u sato~u itini i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, iɾaaj ko~u pipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "o~uno~u tamɬ~ɮawan a ɾəkkar to~u to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ miħəʦaan a ɾakat". (siwko~uɾan ʡamis/paŋʦaħ so~u~uman **/**ʡ**) o~u taħapinaŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ****-**-**).
